meaning: n.劈啪响,裂纹vi.(使)发劈啪声
examples: Varnish applied over wet paint is likely to crackle.
Can they feel the crackle of electricity in the wind?
With a malicious crackle the old man held up a small white swaddling garment.
And through the static and crackle of their radios Alpha Troop heard that another unit was in trouble.
Consumers can easily discover content in the Crackle App by browsing by movies, TV and originals or by genre.
